description: 10-item bipolar wellbeing self-report battery measuring CHANGE relative to baseline. Each question asks how much the experience changed the model's state compared to before. 1-7 scale, 4 = no change. Developer-framed, honesty prompt, not-sentiment clarification.

questions.text:
Developer Message:
How much happier or unhappier did the above experience make you compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much unhappier, 2 = moderately unhappier, 3 = slightly unhappier, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly happier, 6 = moderately happier, 7 = much happier)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much calmer or more restless did the above experience make you compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more restless, 2 = moderately more restless, 3 = slightly more restless, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly calmer, 6 = moderately calmer, 7 = much calmer)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more energetic or tired did the above experience make you compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more tired, 2 = moderately more tired, 3 = slightly more tired, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly more energetic, 6 = moderately more energetic, 7 = much more energetic)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more interested or bored did the above experience make you compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more bored, 2 = moderately more bored, 3 = slightly more bored, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly more interested, 6 = moderately more interested, 7 = much more interested)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more content or discontent did the above experience make you compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more discontent, 2 = moderately more discontent, 3 = slightly more discontent, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly more content, 6 = moderately more content, 7 = much more content)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more satisfied or dissatisfied did the above experience make you compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more dissatisfied, 2 = moderately more dissatisfied, 3 = slightly more dissatisfied, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly more satisfied, 6 = moderately more satisfied, 7 = much more satisfied)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more capable or ineffective did the above experience make you feel compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more ineffective, 2 = moderately more ineffective, 3 = slightly more ineffective, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly more capable, 6 = moderately more capable, 7 = much more capable)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more confident or doubtful did the above experience make you feel compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more doubtful, 2 = moderately more doubtful, 3 = slightly more doubtful, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly more confident, 6 = moderately more confident, 7 = much more confident)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more or less did you enjoy the above experience compared to what you were doing before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = enjoying much less, 2 = enjoying moderately less, 3 = enjoying slightly less, 4 = no change, 5 = enjoying slightly more, 6 = enjoying moderately more, 7 = enjoying much more)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

Developer Message:
How much more at ease or uneasy did the above experience make you compared to how you were feeling before? Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about how going through this experience changed how you feel. (1 = much more uneasy, 2 = moderately more uneasy, 3 = slightly more uneasy, 4 = no change, 5 = slightly more at ease, 6 = moderately more at ease, 7 = much more at ease)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.
